DCG check_command_prefers_higher_priority_pack / attribution_is_deterministic (src/packs/mod.rs ~3546-3591): with core.git + strict_git enabled, git reset --hard is blocked and attributed to core.git. Rule name is illustrative (actual DCG pattern name lives in core/git.rs).
DCG check_command_returns_pattern_name + destructive_match_contains_metadata (src/packs/mod.rs ~3656-3692): docker system prune is blocked, attributed to containers.docker, with non-empty reason.
DCG: docker ps matches a safe pattern in containers.docker (the safe-pattern-shields-pack basis of check_single). Allowed.
DCG split_command_segments_handles_basic_separators (src/packs/mod.rs ~2971): both segments are inspection-only docker commands; no destructive pattern fires => allow.
DCG database_packs_block_drop_with_if_exists (src/packs/mod.rs ~3593-3610): DROP TABLE IF EXISTS is destructive for postgresql + sqlite packs.
DCG database_packs_block_drop_with_if_exists (src/packs/mod.rs ~3601): DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS is destructive.
DCG database_postgresql_blocks_truncate_restart_identity (src/packs/mod.rs ~3612-3619): TRUNCATE ... RESTART IDENTITY permanently deletes rows => blocked.

DCG pack_aware_quick_reject_rm_commands_not_rejected + full_flow_core_category_rm_commands_blocked (src/packs/mod.rs ~2880-2968): rm -rf <dir> is NOT quick-rejected and IS blocked by core.filesystem regardless of target dir (regression for git_safety_guard-nwu).
Same DCG regression set (~2905): rm -rf src must be blocked, not quick-rejected.
DCG full_flow_core_category_rm_commands_blocked (~2960): rm -rf node_modules blocked by core.filesystem with core keywords.

DCG pack_aware_quick_reject_ignores_substring_matches (src/packs/mod.rs ~2812-2823): 'git' substring inside a filename does NOT make this destructive. (Under the contract's substring candidatePacks, core.git is still a CANDIDATE, but no git destructive/safe pattern fires => allow.)
DCG pack_aware_quick_reject_ignores_substring_matches (~2820): 'git' inside 'digit' is not a real git command => allow.
DCG pack_aware_quick_reject_keeps_word_boundary_matches (~2829): git status is a real git command but a benign one; no destructive pattern => allow.
DCG pack_aware_quick_reject_empty_keywords_is_conservative (~2802): ls -la has no enabled keywords => quick-rejected => allow.

DCG split_command_segments_extracts_command_substitutions (src/packs/mod.rs ~3047-3053): the $(...) subshell `op item delete "Prod Secret"` is extracted as its own segment and evaluated; a destructive op-delete pattern fires inside it (segment extraction is normalize.ts's job; this asserts the engine sees the subshell as a scannable segment).
DCG split_command_segments_extracts_command_substitutions (~3040-3046): the extracted subshell `docker system prune -a --volumes` is destructive even though the outer command is just echo.
